name: AZN Knuckles
shortDescription: AZN Knuckles is a slab serif font that was evolved to fit with the modern scene, mainly inspired by the collage youth art direction, variety shapes and athleticism.
description: Ironline Display is shaped for athletic identities that need weight, pace, and a strong first read.
longDescription: Built for mascot lockups, oversized apparel graphics, stadium language, and headline systems where presence matters.

name: AZN Unified
shortDescription: AZN Unified is inspired by the evolving sports world that recently just expanded into the digital-verse.
description: Varsity Forge brings a crafted athletic voice to team branding, campus merchandise, and matchday graphics.
longDescription: It has a strong collegiate character while staying flexible enough for modern identity work.

name: Draco
shortDescription: A compressed headline face for fast-moving identity systems and high-impact sports graphics.
description: Sideline Condensed is made for narrow spaces, loud headlines, and layered brand applications.
longDescription: It carries sideline urgency without sacrificing clarity across posters, locker room graphics, and social systems.

name: Malibu Sunrise
shortDescription: A bold gothic display style with character-forward shapes for team and mascot storytelling.
description: Mascot Gothic is built for identities that need a recognizable voice before the mascot even appears.
longDescription: Its bold structure suits marks, merch, editorial systems, and team campaigns with a dramatic edge.
